title: How Do Companies Build AI-Powered Internal Tools Instead of Buying More SaaS?
pageTitle: How Do Companies Build AI-Powered Internal Tools Instead of Buying More SaaS? — Last Rev
description: The build-vs-buy equation has flipped. Here's how companies are replacing SaaS sprawl with custom AI-powered internal tools — and why 78% plan to build more in 2026.
author: Last Rev Team
